qd.s0_hint: Want to learn more about your skin and its needs? This way
qd.s1_q: Before we start, what's your name?
qd.s4_a3: It shines on my T-zone (forehead, nose, chin)
qd.s4_a4: It shines all over my face
qd.s5_q: When you look in the mirror, what bothers you?
qd.s5_hint: Which area do you want to work on? Multiple choices possible
qd.s5_a3: My skin is uneven, I have blemishes
qd.s5_a5: I have dark circles / puffiness around my eyes
qd.s5_a6: Everything is fine, I just want to boost my routine
qd.s6_q: Do you pay attention to your eye contour?
qd.s6_hint: The skin around the eyes is 3 to 5× thinner than the rest of the face. It doesn't produce a protective barrier — it's essential to give it the protection it needs.
qd.s7_q: What format do you prefer for your lip product?
qd.s8_a5: I don't notice / don't pay attention
qd.s9_q: Now that I know more, tell me what you like
qd.s11_q: What type of routine do you prefer?
qd.s11_hint: Based on your preferences, your time and your wishes.
qd.s11_a3: Long: cleansing, toner, eye contour, serum, moisturising, SPF
qd.s12_hint: It's essential to exfoliate your skin at least once a week to deep cleanse and remove dead skin cells. The mask serves as an SOS response.
qd.s13_q: I have everything I need, thank you!
qd.result_sub: Selected from our range based on your answers
qd.sec1_desc: The micellar water removes makeup & SPF. The cleanser removes sweat & pollution.
qd.sec2_desc: The toner rebalances your skin's pH after cleansing.
qd.sec3_desc: Eye contour & serum concentrated with actives.
qd.sec4_desc: The cream seals in hydration. SPF protects against ageing (morning).
qd.sec5_desc: Use 1 to 2 times a week for deeply cleansed skin.
qd.email_p: Enter your email to receive your personalised selection by email.
qd.email_privacy: Your data stays with us. No spam, promise.

about.title: Korean skincare, curated.
about.sub: We started Clow with one simple idea: bring the best of Korean beauty to Europe — without the noise, without the markup, with the routines that actually work.
about.founder_quote: "My skin spoke to me every day. The right products at the right time — that's the only thing that changed it. Clow exists to make that easy."
about.value_1_d: Sourced directly from Korean labs and brands — never a grey-market reseller. Every batch traceable.
about.value_2_d: We test everything for weeks before it lands on the shelf. If we wouldn't use it, it doesn't make the cut.
about.value_3_d: Sensible ingredients, honest claims, transparent prices. Skincare shouldn't feel like science fiction.
about.timeline_1_d: Laura and Coralie come back from Seoul with a suitcase full of products and a question: why is K-beauty so hard to find well in France?
about.timeline_2_d: First 28 SKUs, hand-picked. The first 100 customers become regulars.
about.timeline_3_d: We launch the 5 routine packs and the skin quiz — because choosing should be simple.
about.timeline_4_d: 12,000+ skin types served. The shelf keeps growing — only with products we actually love.
about.cta_p: Take the 1-minute quiz and we'll build the routine for you.

home.hero_p: Korean skincare curated for healthy, luminous skin. Simple routines, made for your skin type.
home.editorial_sub: A curated edit of the Korean skincare we use, tested and love. No noise — just routines that work.
home.quote: "My skin speaks to me every day. Choosing the right products to meet its needs, when it needs them."
home.ingredient_1_d: Hydration that lasts in 5 molecular weights.
home.ingredient_2_d: Calms reactive skin and rebuilds the barrier.
home.ingredient_4_d: Firmness and rebound — the K-beauty signature.
